controlsRecorded.addSceneElement: div[class*="linearAdder"][class*="bottom"] / svg.dividerIcon tooltip Add scene, under the current shot block

insertedScenes: 0:00-0:03: Start from the Ember source image. Keep one simple cozy backdrop behind Ember: soft warm glow, a few blurred lantern shapes, and no crowd or busy festival detail.
0:03-0:07: Ember gives a tiny friendly wave and blinks. Keep the background nearly still, with only very soft light shimmer.
0:07-0:11: Add a gentle slow push-in. Use very mild parallax only between Ember and the simple blurred background. Let two or three tiny warm sparkles drift slowly, without adding new props.
0:11-0:15: Ember smiles toward the viewer. End on the same simple background and a calm, welcoming character-intro moment that feels like an invitation to search with Ember.
